title: TRUMP'S 50-DAY WARNING TO RUSSIA ⚠️ END UKRAINE WAR OR FACE NEW SANCTIONS
description:
WASHINGTON, D.C. — July 15, 2026

President Donald Trump has issued a major warning to Russia, giving Moscow 50 days to take steps toward ending the war in Ukraine or face serious economic consequences from the United States and its allies.

Trump said he is growing increasingly frustrated with the ongoing conflict, which has caused widespread destruction, thousands of casualties, and continued instability across Europe. He warned that if Russia refuses to move toward a peace agreement, Washington could introduce tougher economic measures aimed at increasing pressure on the Kremlin.

“We want to see the war end,” Trump said, emphasizing that his goal is to push both sides toward negotiations and prevent further loss of life.

The possible actions against Russia could include expanded sanctions, trade restrictions, and financial penalties designed to limit Moscow’s ability to fund its military operations. Experts say any new measures could have a major impact on global energy markets, international trade, and diplomatic relations.

Russia has not shown signs of changing its position and has continued its military operations in Ukraine. Kremlin officials have repeatedly stated that they will protect what they describe as Russia’s national interests.

Ukraine has welcomed continued support from the United States and European allies, saying stronger international pressure on Russia could help create conditions for future peace talks.

The 50-day deadline is now being closely watched by governments, investors, and security analysts around the world. If no agreement is reached, the next phase could bring increased economic pressure and a new escalation in tensions between Russia and the West.

The coming weeks could become a critical moment in the conflict, with global leaders watching closely to see whether diplomacy succeeds or tensions rise further.
